name: DNV Veracity Maritime and Energy Data Platform API
what_it_does: DNV Veracity maritime and energy data platform API for shipowners, energy companies, class societies, and maritime technology providers to access vessel performance data, energy efficiency analytics, digital twin services, carbon emissions reporting, and maritime regulatory compliance data — enabling automated vessel performance monitoring, energy efficiency benchmarking, CII (Carbon Intensity Indicator) tracking, and digital twin integration through DNV's trusted maritime and energy intelligence platform. Enables AI agents to manage vessel performance data for fuel consumption and efficiency analytics automation, handle energy data for maritime decarbonization and CII compliance automation, access digital twin for vessel operational simulation and optimization automation, retrieve emissions data for IMO carbon intensity and EEXI compliance automation, manage class survey for DNV certificate and survey status automation, handle structural data for hull inspection and integrity monitoring automation, access weather routing for voyage optimization analytics automation, retrieve predictive maintenance for equipment failure prevention automation, manage port state control for compliance and deficiency tracking automation, and integrate DNV Veracity with IMOS, ERP, and fleet management systems for maritime digital transformation automation.
use_cases: Monitoring vessel fuel consumption and CII performance for maritime decarbonization automation agents
Accessing DNV class survey and certificate status for fleet compliance tracking automation agents
Analyzing vessel performance data for energy efficiency optimization automation agents
Reporting carbon emissions data for IMO and EU regulatory compliance automation agents
not_for: AIS real-time vessel tracking (DNV Veracity is performance/class data, not AIS position like MarineTraffic)
Commercial chartering operations (DNV Veracity is technical/regulatory data, not voyage management)
Port operations (DNV Veracity is vessel and energy data, not port terminal operations)
best_when: A shipowner, ship manager, energy company, or maritime technology provider wanting AI agents to automate vessel performance monitoring, carbon emissions tracking, CII compliance reporting, and DNV class certificate management through DNV's trusted maritime data platform.
avoid_when: DNV CUSTOMER RELATIONSHIP REQUIRED: Veracity access requires DNV customer or partner relationship; automated open developer access assumption creates no_access without DNV engagement; automated must establish DNV Veracity account through customer or partner channel. VESSEL DATA IS OWNER-SUBMITTED: Performance data in Veracity is submitted by vessel owners/operators; automated pre-populated data assumption creates empty_vessel for vessels without submitted performance data; automated must coordinate data submission with vessel operators. CARBON REGULATIONS CHANGE FREQUENTLY: IMO CII and EEXI regulations evolve; automated static compliance rule assumption creates outdated_regulation for new IMO requirements; automated must track IMO regulatory updates. DIGITAL TWIN REQUIRES VESSEL MODEL: Veracity digital twin services require vessel-specific model creation; automated instant digital twin assumption creates model_not_created; automated must complete vessel modelling before digital twin analytics.

auth.notes: DNV Veracity uses OAuth2 (Azure AD B2C) for maritime data platform API. REST API with JSON. Bærum, Norway HQ (DNV HQ). Founded 1864 as Det Norske Veritas. Products: Veracity Data Platform, Veracity Identity (Azure B2C), DNV Class Digital, ECO Insight (energy), Stasim (stability), Windlass (anchor chain). SDKs: Python/JS. Azure-hosted. 22,000+ DNV-classed vessels. 100+ years maritime classification. Competes with Bureau Veritas and Lloyd's Register for classification society data services.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free Veracity account for accessing public datasets; premium data and services require subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Service-specific pricing; DNV class data by vessel; Energy analytics subscription; Digital twin project pricing
pricing.notes: Bærum NO. DNV classification society. Freemium + subscription. 22K+ classed vessels. Maritime data leader.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth token; data and analytics APIs throttled per subscription tier

known_agent_gotchas: AZURE B2C IDENTITY IS THE AUTH LAYER: DNV Veracity uses Azure Active Directory B2C for identity; automated standard OAuth2 assumption creates Azure-specific token endpoint and tenant configuration requirements; automated must configure Azure B2C tenant details for Veracity auth

VESSEL IMO NUMBER IS THE KEY IDENTIFIER: Veracity data is organized by vessel IMO number; automated MMSI-based lookup assumption creates vessel_not_found for MMSI-only queries; automated must use IMO number as primary vessel identifier

CII CALCULATION IS COMPLEX: IMO Carbon Intensity Indicator calculation involves multiple variables (fuel type, distance, cargo); automated simple CII assumption creates calculation_error; automated must implement IMO CII calculation methodology correctly

DATA SHARING REQUIRES VESSEL OWNER CONSENT: Vessel performance data sharing in Veracity requires explicit owner consent; automated free data access assumption creates consent_required for non-public vessel data; automated must have vessel owner consent for performance data sharing

CLASSIFICATION EVENTS ARE BATCH UPDATED: DNV class events (surveys, certificates) update on classification event cycles, not real-time; automated real-time class status assumption creates stale certificate data; automated must account for DNV classification update cycles
agent_readiness.security_notes: Maritime classification data. GDPR, IMO. OAuth2/Azure B2C. EU/NO. Vessel performance and class data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Maritime data. GDPR. Azure B2C OAuth2. Norway/EU. Vessel and energy performance data.
